2189810.name: MERCS
2189810.description:
Welcome to the war, commander! MERCS places you in command of a mercenary company on a distant world in turmoil. Gather a team of mercenaries, design your own vehicles for them to pilot, complete missions and earn cash for your corporation!

On a distant world, a brutal regime has taken control of the most powerful northern kingdom and snuffed out all resistance from neighboring states... all but one. Will you help the oppressive government crush the last pocket of resistance in the south, or will you side with the rebels and try to restore freedom to the people?

Game Features

-Tactical turn-based combat on a dystopian world

-Vehicle design and customization

-Corporation Management

-Campaign and Skirmish modes

Game is a work in progress, as more features/content are added, this page will be updated. Release date/pricing TBA.
2189810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
